name: Pryce Table Lamp - 20 Inch Height - TBL4490 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Pryce 21 inch black iron table lamp. This lamp combines sleek design with practicality, making it a stylish addition to any room. The sturdy iron base provides a solid foundation while the black finish offers a timeless look that fits effortlessly into various decor styles. Topped with a cotton shade, this lamp disperses light evenly, creating a cozy and inviting atmosphere. Ideal for your living room, bedroom, or office, the Pryce table lamp is both functional and fashionable. Embrace simplicity and elegance with this versatile lighting solution that enhances every space without overwhelming it.
